title: GTCX Role Schema
description: Machine-readable role definition for agentic consumption

owns.description: Files and directories this role owns

doesNotOwn.description: Files and directories explicitly outside this role's scope

autonomous.description: Whether this role can act without human approval

autonomousBoundaries.description: Paths within which this role is autonomous

escalationTriggers.description: Conditions that trigger escalation to human review

requiredArtifacts.description: Artifacts this role must produce or maintain
